data.title: Razor A5 Lux Kick Scooter for Kids Ages 8+ - 8" Urethane Wheels, Anodized Finish Featuring Bold Colors and Graphics, for Ride

features: urethane wheels provide a super-smooth and comfortable ride
aluminum T-tube and larger deck supports taller riders
Anodized finish features bold colors and attention-grabbing graphics
Easy-adjust handlebars include soft foam grips for enhanced comfort
